title: 'Ephraath #0672
definition:
Ephrath or Ephratah = "ash-heap: place of fruitfulness"

 n pr loc
 1) a place near Bethel where Rachel died and was buried
 2) another name for Bethlehem

 n pr f
 3) wife of Caleb
nasbUsage:
Definition: Ephrath or Ephratah = "ash-heap: place of fruitfulness"

 n pr loc
 1) a place near Bethel where Rachel died and was buried
 2) another name for Bethlehem

 n pr f
 3) wife of Caleb

    NASB:  an Isr. woman, also the name of several places in Pal.
